review_scope: High-impact MD1 non-starters and official feed status changes before MD2 recommendation rebuild.
source_policy: Official fantasy feed status and MD1 matchStatus are primary. Public-source links are supporting context only. When no reliable current external source is available, the model action remains conservative and explicitly manual-review flagged.
